demographics.audit_notes: Corrected total_population from 15230 to 4583 based on 1990 Decennial Census data for Tract 205.13. The original value was implausibly high. Population density and median age were also corrected to align with census data.
Corrected all demographic values to reflect linear interpolation between corrected 1990 and 2000 Census anchor points. Original values were based on flawed data.
Corrected total_population from 21100 to 5601 based on 2000 Decennial Census. Original value was implausibly high. Corrected density, median age, and diversity index to align with census data.
Corrected all demographic values to reflect linear interpolation between corrected 2000 and 2010 Census anchor points. Original values were based on flawed data.
Corrected total_population from 25890 to 6421 based on 2010 Decennial Census. Original value was implausibly high. Corrected density, median age, and diversity index to align with census/ACS data.
Corrected population values to reflect linear interpolation between corrected 2010 and 2020 Census anchor points. Other values updated using ACS 2011-2015 data.
Corrected total_population from 34250 to 8333 based on 2020 Decennial Census. Original value was implausibly high. Corrected density and median age to align with census/ACS data.
Corrected population based on 2020 census and projected forward using recent ACS trends. Original values were based on a flawed 2020 baseline.

property.audit_notes: Corrected homeownership_rate_percent from 68.5 to 45.3 to align with 1990 Census data. The original value was significantly overstated for this apartment-heavy tract.
Corrected median_rent_usd and homeownership_rate_percent to reflect interpolation between corrected 1990 and 2000 values.
Corrected median_home_value_usd (from 185k), median_rent_usd (from 950), and homeownership_rate_percent (from 71.2) to align with 2000 Census data.
Corrected values to reflect interpolation between corrected 2000 and 2010 anchor points.
Corrected median_rent_usd (from 1150) and homeownership_rate_percent (from 68) to align with ACS 2006-2010 data. Original values were significantly overstated.
Corrected median_rent_usd (from 1400) and homeownership_rate_percent (from 66.5) to align with ACS 2011-2015 data.
Corrected median_home_value_usd (from 450k), median_rent_usd (from 1750), and homeownership_rate_percent (from 65.8) to align with ACS/Zillow data for 2020.
The >35% YoY jump in median home value is extreme but aligns with market data for Austin in 2021. Corrected homeownership rate based on ACS data.
Corrected homeownership rate based on latest available ACS data.
Values reflect market cooling in late 2022/early 2023. Corrected homeownership rate based on trend.
All values are projections based on recent market trends. Corrected homeownership rate based on trend.

socioeconomic.audit_notes: Corrected median_household_income_usd from 42000 to 36500 and unemployment from 5.1 to 4.5 to align with 1990 Census. Added new fields with estimates as ACS data is not available.
Corrected income and education to reflect interpolation between corrected 1990 and 2000 values.
Corrected median_household_income_usd from 65000 to 55000 and percent_bachelors_degree_or_higher from 46.5 to 52.0 to align with 2000 Census.
Corrected income and education to reflect interpolation between corrected 2000 and 2010 values.
